name: project-wedding
description: Project Dynamic Single-Page Untuk Undangan Pernikahan with CMS Angular, Express, Prisma ORM, dan MySQL

scripts.install: bun x concurrently "npm run install:fe" "npm run install:be"
scripts.dev:fe: cd frontend && bun x ng serve
scripts.dev:be: cd backend && nodemon --exec bun run src/app.ts
scripts.dev: bun x concurrently "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:be"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && bun x prisma db push
scripts.db:pull: cd backend && bun x prisma db pull
scripts.db:gen: cd backend && bun x prisma generate
scripts.db:init: cd backend && bun x prisma db pull && bun x prisma generate

author: Iqsan Syachranie
